_meta.concept: Alle Deutsche Wochenschau Episoden chronologisch als Permastream

stream.title: Classic WWII Newsreels 24/7 | Deutsche Wochenschau Restored | 8K HQ (4K UHD)
stream.description_template:
🎬 Vintage German WWII newsreels restored in stunning 8K — the original Deutsche Wochenschau, remastered with AI.
Watch rare original footage from 1939–1945, broadcasting 24/7 in chronological order. New episodes added regularly!

📢 REQUEST EPISODES IN LIVE CHAT!
Want to see a specific battle, event or year? Tell us in chat!
We are actively restoring the full collection (252 episodes) and prioritize YOUR requests.
👉 Currently streaming: 39 verified 8K episodes | Goal: all 252

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ HISTORICAL DOCUMENT — EDUCATIONAL USE ONLY
This stream shows original World War II propaganda newsreels.
The views expressed do NOT reflect the opinion of the uploader.
Shown for educational, documentary and historical purposes only.

HISTORISCHES DOKUMENT — NUR ZU BILDUNGSZWECKEN
Dieses Material zeigt Original-Propaganda der NS-Zeit und dient
ausschließlich der historischen Dokumentation und Bildung.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📺 WHAT IS THIS STREAM?
The Deutsche Wochenschau was a weekly newsreel shown in German cinemas during World War II (1939–1945). These classic propaganda films documented battles, politics and daily wartime life from the German perspective.

Every episode has been AI-remastered from original 35mm film scans to breathtaking 8K resolution. This is the only stream offering these vintage newsreels in restored quality, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

🎬 FEATURED EVENTS:
• Invasion of Poland (1939)
• Fall of France (1940)
• Battle of Britain (1940)
• Operation Barbarossa (1941)
• Siege of Stalingrad (1942–1943)
• D-Day & Allied Advance (1944)
• Final Days of the Third Reich (1945)
